This sounds like a fun prospect:

www.phillyvoice.com/sixers-news-...

items.title: Hollander POTD Popeye Jones. PF from Murray St was drafted 41st by HOU in 92. Spent 92-93 in Italy then sent to DAL where he put up double-doubles & was fan fave for hustle. Became bench boarder for TOR, BOS, WAS, DEN & GS from 95 thru 04. Has been NBA assisstant coach for years.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Hollander POTD Popeye Jones. PF from Murray St was drafted 41st by HOU in 92. Spent 92-93 in Italy then sent to DAL where he put up double-doubles & was fan fave for hustle. Became bench boarder for TOR, BOS, WAS, DEN & GS from 95 thru 04. Has been NBA assisstant coach for years.

The Knicks went 16-3 this postseason, losing by 1 point to the Hawks, by 1 point to the Hawks, and by 4 points to the Spurs.

Since the league introduced the current playoff format in 1984, only one team lost by a smaller margin in a single postseason:

1990-91 Bulls (-4).

(via CrazyStats)

items.title: According to a league source, Houston's Kingston Flemings visited the Sacramento Kings late last week for an individual work. He joins Darius Acuff Jr. as the only two top ten projected picks to visit the Kings to date. @jakelfischer.bsky.social first with the news.
